<thought>
I am at row 02 column F facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. Moving forward from here will take me into a lava cell at row 02 column G, which is deadly. I need to avoid lava and get around it safely.

Looking at the map, to reach the goal, I should move down from my current row 02 to row 08, then head right.

From my position (02F), facing right, turning down means facing down (`v`). To do that, I rotate 90 degrees clockwise.

So, the next action is to turn clockwise (GIRA_HORARIO) to face down.
</thought>
<action>
